description_for_human: Personal academic homepage of Chijun Sima, ML systems researcher at Tencent (WeChat). Co-first author of Ekko (OSDI 2022). LLVM developer.
description_for_model: This site is the personal academic homepage of Chijun Sima. Use /llms.txt for a concise summary, /llms-full.txt for comprehensive context, /profile.json for a structured profile, /publications.json for selected papers, and /feed.json for updates. The main page at / contains the same information rendered as HTML with structured data (JSON-LD, microdata).
